title: Tinubu Government Has Trapped INEC; Amupitan Cannot Give Nigerians Free, Fair Elections — Sowore - SAHARA REPORTERS
content:
Human rights activist and former presidential candidate, Omoyele Sowore, has said that Nigeria’s Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) is effectively trapped under the control of the administration of President Bola Tinubu.

Sowore noted that INEC Chairman, Prof Joash Amupitan could not do anything different from his predecessors as he lacks the independence to deliver free, fair, and credible elections to Nigerians.

title: ‘Death warrant on credible elections’ — ADC slams Tinubu for signing electoral amendment bill ↔ THE CABLE
content:
The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has criticised President Bola Tinubu’s assent to the Electoral Act Amendment Bill, saying the move is tantamount to signing “the death warrant on credible elections” in Nigeria.

In a statement issued on Thursday by Bolaji Abdullahi, national publicity secretary of the party, the ADC questioned the speed with which the president approved the bill despite objections from citizens, describing it as part of an alleged scheme to rig the 2027 election.
